```lean
```lean
```lean
inductive MyFalse : Prop
#guard_msgs in
example {A B : Prop} : if P then A else B := by
  aesop? (config := { warnOnNonterminal := false })
  all_goals
  simp_all [If]
  <;>
  (try
    {
      by_cases h : P <;>
      simp_all [h]
    }) <;>
  (try
    {
      tauto
    }) <;>
  (try
    {
      exfalso
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [MyFalse]
        })
    })
```lean
```lean
inductive MyFalse : Prop
#guard_msgs in
example {A B : Prop} : if P then A else B := by
  aesop? (config := { warnOnNonterminal := false })
  all_goals
  simp_all [If]
  <;>
  (try
    {
      by_cases h : P <;>
      simp_all [h]
    }) <;>
  (try
    {
      tauto
    }) <;>
  (try
    {
      exfalso
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [MyFalse]
          <;>
          (try
            {
              trivial
            })
          <;>
          (try
            {
              exact MyFalse.elim (by tauto)
            })
        })
    })
